text: Last class we learned numbers and time.
Now we learn the places in the city.
Bank
Pharmacy
Supermarket
Bus stop
Square
Corner
The office is in a quiet street.
The bank is on the corner.
I wait at the bus stop.
The pharmacy is next to the bank.
Turn left at the corner.
Go straight for two minutes.
The office is next to the supermarket.
Hi Dienane, I am at the bus stop. How do I get to the office?
Welcome, Bruno! Walk to the corner and turn left. The bank is on the corner.
Okay, I see the bank. What is next?
Go straight. The pharmacy is next to the bank, and the supermarket is across from the pharmacy.
Great. And where is the office?
The office is between the supermarket and the square, on the second floor. Call me when you arrive!

Hi Dienane, this is Bruno. I am calling about the new office. It is easy to find. From the bus stop, walk to the corner and turn left. The bank is on the corner. Walk straight for two minutes. The pharmacy is next to the bank, and the supermarket is across from the pharmacy. Our office is between the supermarket and the square. There is a small park in the square, so you cannot miss it. The office is on the second floor. I am at my desk now, so call me when you arrive. See you soon.

Hello, let me tell you about the places near my office. The office is in a quiet street. There is a bank on the corner, and a pharmacy next to the bank. I buy my lunch at the supermarket across from the pharmacy. There is a nice square near the office with a small park. I wait for the bus at the bus stop in front of the square. Everything I need is close, so I walk to work every day. It is a very good place to work.

Dienane meets Bruno at the bus stop. They walk to the corner and turn left at the bank. They pass the pharmacy and the supermarket. They find the office between the supermarket and the square. They go up to the office on the second floor.

Pharmacy
Supermarket

Square
Corner
The bank is on the corner.
The pharmacy is next to the bank.
I buy food at the supermarket.
I wait at the bus stop every morning.
There is a small park in the square.
Turn left at the corner.
I wait at the bus stop.
The office is between the supermarket and the square.
